features: Pet Grooming Slicker Brush Medium to Long Hair
Introducing the Pet Grooming Slicker Brush, the ultimate tool for maintaining the health and beauty of your medium to long-haired pets.
This expertly designed brush effortlessly smooths and detangles knotted hair, making grooming a breeze for both you and your furry friend.
The slicker brush not only removes loose fur and debris but also helps distribute natural oils throughout the coat, promoting a shiny and healthy appearance.
Featuring a soft grip handle, it ensures maximum comfort and support during grooming sessions, allowing you to pamper your pet without straining your hand.
Plus, the innovative retractable pins make it easy to dispose of shed hair, keeping your grooming area tidy and hassle-free.
description: Pet Grooming Slicker Brush Medium to Long Hair Introducing the Pet Grooming Slicker Brush, the ultimate tool for maintaining the health and beauty of your medium to long-haired pets. This expertly designed brush effortlessly smooths and detangles knotted hair, making grooming a breeze for both you and your furry friend. The slicker brush not only removes loose fur and debris but also helps distribute natural oils throughout the coat, promoting a shiny and healthy appearance. Featuring a soft grip handle, it ensures maximum comfort and support during grooming sessions, allowing you to pamper your pet without straining your hand. Plus, the innovative retractable pins make it easy to dispose of shed hair, keeping your grooming area tidy and hassle-free. Elevate your pet's grooming routine with this essential tool that combines functionality with comfort, ensuring a pleasant experience for both you and your beloved companion. Measures 20cm in total length, featuring a comfortable 13cm handle that ensures a secure grip during use. The oval brush head, measuring 6.5cm by 11cm, is perfect for achieving a smooth and even application, making it an essential tool for your beauty routine.
